heading: Tweed Heads South vs Tweed Heads West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tweed Heads South, New South Wales and Tweed Heads West, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tweed Heads West has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tweed Heads South (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tweed Heads South or Tweed Heads West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tweed Heads South has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Tweed Heads West scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tweed Heads South scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Tweed Heads West scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tweed Heads South or Tweed Heads West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tweed Heads West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
